case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. CHARLES BATES et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-02-2008 CONTINUED TO AUG-01-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION PER 1033CCP(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. MR. BATES FAILED TO PROVIDE ANY FACTS SHOWING THAT THE FUNDS ARE EXEMPT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, NOT REPORTED.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATES, CHARLIE $2,214.87 PRINCIPAL, $859.25 INTEREST, $230.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,304.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the claim of exemption is denied. Mr. Bates failed to provide any facts showing that the funds are exempt. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.
